message:
fix(review-r1): surface pass — 3 clippy lints across core + server

- metrics.rs: map_or(false, ..) → is_some_and(..) (unnecessary_map_or)
- experience.rs: collapse 2 nested if-let blocks (collapsible_if)
- system_health.rs: remove explicit Vec<(&String, &u64)> annotation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
